markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.044 — Suspension or Revocation of Deputy Branch Pilot’s Certificate

A deputy branch pilot’s certificate may be suspended or revoked by the board in the same manner and for the same reasons as provided for the suspension or revocation of a branch pilot’s license by Section 69.043 (Suspension or Revocation of Branch Pilot’s License) .

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.text: A deputy branch pilot’s certificate may be suspended or revoked by the board in the same manner and for the same reasons as provided for the suspension or revocation of a branch pilot’s license by Section 69.043 (Suspension or Revocation of Branch Pilot’s License) .

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.
